name: tv-tail
title: tv-tail
description: Live console + error stream from any browser app. Drop-in client shim, shared signal-argh channel, hosted dashboard with per-app filters.
posterNote: Title-card poster showing the dashboard's three-panel layout.

canon.summary: Telemetry dashboard + canonical drop-in shim. Closes the deploy → test → log → fix loop on devices without devtools.
canon.syncPrompt: Look at the new canon and sync yourself with canon.
checklist: Site metadata declares canon version + source.
Dashboard subscribes to a single shared signal-argh channel.
log-tap.js is published at the same origin and can be loaded as a CDN by any other app.
